meta.note: Each user has a role, profile, and a conversation array. Send turns in order. Copy session_id from the first response and pass it in subsequent turns.

request.message: I know basic Python and HTML. What should I learn next to become a full-stack developer?
How long will it take to learn JavaScript if I study 2 hours a day?
Which of these courses fits my current level best?
context_data: Course: JavaScript for Beginners. Level: Beginner. Topics: variables, DOM, events, fetch API. Rating: 4.7. Duration: 12 hours.
Course: React Fundamentals. Level: Intermediate. Prerequisites: JavaScript ES6. Rating: 4.9. Duration: 18 hours.
Course: Node.js & Express. Level: Intermediate. Prerequisites: JavaScript basics. Rating: 4.6. Duration: 15 hours.

request.message: Generate a course description for: Machine Learning with Python — covering linear regression, decision trees, random forests, and neural networks. Target audience: developers with basic Python knowledge.
What price point would you recommend for this course given the content depth and my existing 4.6 rating?

conversation.description: Ask for improvement advice with context of existing courses

request.message: My current Data Science course has a 4.6 rating but students say the projects are too theoretical. How can I add more practical exercises?
context_data: Student feedback: 'Great theory but I wish there were more real-world datasets to work with.'
Student feedback: 'The final project was too simple. I wanted something I could put on my portfolio.'
Student feedback: 'Loved the content but the quizzes felt disconnected from the lectures.'

request.message: I need a developer to build an online store for my fashion boutique. It should have product listings with filters, a shopping cart, Stripe payments, order tracking, and a simple admin panel to manage inventory.
What is a realistic budget and timeline for this project?
Which of these freelancers would you recommend for my e-commerce project?
context_data: Freelancer: Yusuf A. Skills: React, Node.js, Stripe, MongoDB. Experience: 4 years. Rate: $40/hr. Rating: 4.8. Portfolio: 3 e-commerce sites.
Freelancer: Mia T. Skills: Vue.js, Laravel, MySQL, PayPal. Experience: 5 years. Rate: $50/hr. Rating: 4.9. Portfolio: 5 e-commerce sites.
Freelancer: Rami K. Skills: WordPress, WooCommerce, Stripe. Experience: 3 years. Rate: $25/hr. Rating: 4.5. Portfolio: 8 WooCommerce stores.

request.message: How should I structure milestone payments to protect myself if the freelancer does not deliver on time?

conversation.description: Generate a proposal for a job

request.message: Write a proposal for this job posting: 'We need a backend developer to build a REST API for a healthcare appointment booking system. Tech stack: Django, PostgreSQL, JWT authentication. Budget: $3500. Duration: 6 weeks.' My skills: Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, 5 years experience, 4.8 rating.

conversation.description: Follow-up — ask how to make the proposal stronger

request.message: How can I make this proposal stand out from other applicants? The client mentioned they received 15 proposals already.

Extract skill tags from my profile description: I am a backend developer with 5 years of experience specializing in Python, Django, and FastAPI. I build scalable REST APIs, work with PostgreSQL and Redis, containerize apps with Docker, and deploy on AWS EC2 and RDS. I follow TDD practices and write comprehensive test suites.
Which of these jobs is the best match for my skills?
context_data: Job: Build a Django REST API for a fintech startup. Budget: $4000. Duration: 8 weeks. Required: Django, PostgreSQL, Celery, Redis.
Job: React Native mobile app for a gym management system. Budget: $2500. Duration: 6 weeks. Required: React Native, Firebase.
Job: FastAPI microservice for an AI analytics platform. Budget: $3000. Duration: 5 weeks. Required: FastAPI, Docker, AWS, PostgreSQL.
Job: WordPress site for a restaurant. Budget: $500. Duration: 1 week. Required: WordPress, WooCommerce.

request.message: What are the most important metrics I should monitor weekly to track platform health across both the Course Marketplace and Freelancing Marketplace?
A user has been reported 4 times this week for leaving fake 5-star reviews on courses they never enrolled in. What is the correct moderation process and what actions can I take?
A new course titled 'Earn $10,000 a month with crypto' has been flagged by 3 users for misleading claims. How should I review and decide whether to approve, request changes, or remove it?
What is Arifgate and what can I do here?
Are there courses for complete beginners? I have never coded before.
How do I create an account and start learning?
